pages.text: The $(thing)Tobacco Barrel$() is used for $(item)fermentation$() and $(item)aging$(). It accepts loose tobacco and cured tobacco leaf. It does not accept fresh uncured leaf.
A barrel can hold up to $(item)16$() matching tobacco items in one batch. Different qualities and different blends should be kept separate.
Use $(thing)/tobacconist debug$() while looking at a barrel to inspect warmth, humidity, barrel humidity, current mode, aging, and fermentation progress.
